refactor.refactored_sql:
with source_product as (
    select * from [bronze].[Product]
),

target_table as (
    select * from [silver].[UpdateJoinTarget]
),

joined_update as (
    select
        tgt.ProductAlternateKey,
        src.ProductName as EnglishProductName,
        getdate() as LastSeenDate
    from target_table as tgt
    inner join source_product as src
        on tgt.ProductAlternateKey = cast(src.ProductID as nvarchar(25))
),

final as (
    select
        ProductAlternateKey,
        EnglishProductName,
        LastSeenDate
    from joined_update
)

select * from final

statements.sql: UPDATE tgt SET tgt.EnglishProductName = src.ProductName, tgt.LastSeenDate = GETDATE() FROM silver.UpdateJoinTarget AS tgt INNER JOIN bronze.Product AS src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))
